description: Compute the angle between two points on the sphere. Prefer `angular_separation_rad` to be more explicit about units.
comment: Input coordinates in radians (RA_1, DEC_1, RA_2, DEC_2). Output angle in radians.

description: Compute the angular separation between two sky positions
comment: Input coordinates in radians (RA_1, DEC_1, RA_2, DEC_2). Output separation in radians.

description: Compute the angular separation between two sky positions
comment: Input coordinates in degrees (RA_1, DEC_1, RA_2, DEC_2). Output separation in degrees.
